title: Manipal Digital Health is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Manipal Digital Health is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Manipal Digital Health invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Full Stack Developer at our Gwalior location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Manipal Digital Health:
Manipal Digital Health is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in AWS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Manipal Digital Health!
